$comment: Course-level metadata for From Regulation to Reputation - The RAG Pathway. Lessons live in NN-<slug>.md files alongside this file. The `parts` array drives the editorial dividers on the course overview chapter ledger; each entry's `startOrder` matches the `order` field in the first lesson of that arc. Edit here, not inside lesson markdown.

parts.title: Foundations
parts.body: The reality of practising aesthetics in England, and where you currently sit.

parts.title: Building reputation
parts.body: The Traffic Light System, legal essentials, clinic set-up, and clinical governance.

parts.title: Becoming the trusted authority
parts.body: Advertising safely, training and CPD, and integrating it all into a defensible practice.
